sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ هُنَاكَ ثَعَالِبُ صَغِيرٌ اسْمُهُ فَارُوقٌ يَعِيشُ وَحِيدًا فِي الْغَابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je mali lisac po imenu Faruq koji je živio sam u šumi.
sentences.translationEn: There was a small fox named Faruq who lived alone in the forest.

sentences.arabic: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ لَقِيَ أَرْنَبًا أَبْيَضَ يَبْكِي وَحْدَهُ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana je sreo bijelog zeca koji je plakao sam.
sentences.translationEn: One day he met a white rabbit crying alone.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَهُ: «لِمَاذَا تَبْكِي؟» فَقَالَ الأَرْنَبُ: «ضَاعَ طَرِيقِي إِلَى الْبَيْتِ».
sentences.translation: Upitao ga je: «Zašto plakaš?» Pa je zec rekao: «Izgubio sam put do kuće».
sentences.translationEn: He asked: «Why are you crying?» The rabbit said: «I lost my way home».

sentences.arabic: قَادَهُ فَارُوقٌ إِلَى بَيْتِهِ وَأَصْبَحَا صَدِيقَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Faruq ga je odveo do kuće i postali su prijatelji.
sentences.translationEn: Faruq led him home and they became friends.
